title: koeleria spicata subsp. wrangelensis
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. wrangelensis, also known as Wrangel Koeleria, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the Wrangel Island. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The Wrangel Koeleria plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture by herbalists, which can be used as a natural remedy for its medicinal properties.
